name: Devon Lane
text: "We love Seoul Mirage! Our team has been using their serums for projects, and the results are consistently amazing. The glow is real!"

name: Arlene McCoy
text: "The Brightening Serum is a game changer. I've tried many premium brands, but the clean ingredients here really make a difference for my sensitive skin."

name: Kathryn Murphy
text: "Finally, a moisturizer that doesn't feel greasy! It sinks right in and keeps me hydrated all day. Highly recommend to everyone looking for quality."

name: Eleanor Pena
text: "I've seen a visible reduction in my fine lines after just two weeks of using the Night Repair. This is officially my new holy grail skincare routine."
